proposal_summary: Funding request for 3 months to develop Propdates 2.0, a tool for tracking proposal updates and successes, totaling 37 ETH.

disclosed_entities.name: Nouns DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: expected that a proposer regularly updates the DAO on their work

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Provide 3 months of funding to the development team via a stream.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Team: 30 ETH for three months (via Stream)

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Provide 0.05 ETH to each of the first 100 successful props (before prop #363) that post a non-trivial update.

claimed_complexity.reason: Includes setting up a payment stream and standard transfers, though specific technical parameters are not provided in the text.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Team: 30 ETH for three months (via Stream) | Incentives: 5 ETH | OpEx: 2 ETH

limitations: No precise destination addresses or specific smart contract calls are provided in the proposal text to verify the on-chain execution payload.
